message: Partial lens failure is not tested through the CLI JSON output path, even though skipped reviewer/lens details are required there.
evidence: The test calls ReviewRun with only Reviewer set, then checks human stdout. Existing JSON-output tests cover clean/error paths but not skipped_lenses.

message: Partial lens failure tests do not verify that successful lens results are still collected into proposals.
evidence: The transport used by the new tests writes empty reviewer stdout, so the round has zero proposals and would still pass if proposal collection for successful partial-failure attempts regressed.

message: docs/agents.md still documents the old reviewer lens failure behavior: it says any failed attempt fails the whole round, but the implemented behavior now skips failed reviewer/lens attempts and continues when at least one lens succeeds.
evidence: docs/agents.md lines 559-561 state that any failed lens attempt fails the round as a whole; the changed review loop now records skipped_lenses and only returns an error when successCount == 0.
